name: Single zone solar cooling smoke case
source: Offline committed reference fixture placeholder; real EnergyPlus model/output to be added in a future validation milestone.
purpose: Prepare comparative validation fixture structure for simplified solar cooling behavior; not exact EnergyPlus parity and not ASHRAE 140 certification.
notAClaim: Does not claim exact EnergyPlus numerical parity.
Does not claim ASHRAE 140 validation coverage.
Does not claim full ISO 52016 node/matrix solver parity.
Does not claim full optical glazing or EnergyPlus solar distribution parity.
weatherSource: Synthetic summer weather with daytime solar profile.

geometry.description: Single-zone rectangular box with one south-facing window.

envelope.description: Simple U-value envelope with simplified SHGC window.

solar.description: Simplified SHGC/shading solar model with ISO52010-inspired isotropic sky transposition.

hvacControl.description: Ideal cooling load, fixed cooling setpoint, no heating.

expectedEngineeringBehavior: Cooling load is positive under summer solar exposure.
Window solar gain increases cooling demand.
Solar orientation response is directional, not exact EnergyPlus solar distribution parity.
knownDifferences: AssistantEngineer does not model detailed EnergyPlus solar distribution.
AssistantEngineer does not model detailed glazing optics.
Exact hourly solar parity is not expected.
